runs.summary: Master Services Agreement - Vendor Draft: 6 risk(s), 1 gap(s) and 6 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Potential delay in security incident notification Main evidence gap: No specific owner is mentioned for any action items
warnings: No specific owner is mentioned for any action items
Open-ended questions may require additional human reading when the document has contextual ambiguity.

decision_summary.label: Approve with changes
decision_summary.summary: Multiple high-risk gaps identified in security incident notification, audit rights, subprocessor control, and data deletion; requires contractual strengthening before approval.
decision_summary.due_date: within 10 business days after determining that a material incident occurred

watchouts: No specific owner is mentioned for any action items
Open-ended questions may require additional human reading when the document has contextual ambiguity.

findings.title: Potential delay in security incident notification
findings.description: Provider will notify Customer within 10 business days after determining that a material incident occurred.
findings.snippet: Provider will notify Customer within 10 business days after determining that a material incident occurred.

findings.title: Lack of customer audit rights
findings.description: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.
findings.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

findings.title: Uncontrolled updates to subprocessor list
findings.description: Provider may update its subprocessor list from time to time without approval; notice is provided only upon request.
findings.snippet: Provider may update its subprocessor list from time to time without approval; notice is provided only upon request.

findings.title: No stated deadline for data deletion
findings.description: No commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination. No deletion deadline is stated.
findings.snippet: No commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination.

evidence_trail.snippet: Provider will notify Customer within 10 business days after determining that a material incident occurred.

evidence_trail.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

evidence_trail.title: Uncontrolled updates to subprocessor list
evidence_trail.snippet: Provider may update its subprocessor list from time to time without approval; notice is provided only upon request.

evidence_trail.title: No stated deadline for data deletion
